mapper.sql: id, question_type, question, option_a, option_b, option_c, option_d, options, answer, analysis, difficulty, word_id, article_id, listening_id, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_question WHERE question_type = #{questionType} AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_question (question_type, question, option_a, option_b, option_c, option_d, options, answer, analysis, difficulty, word_id, article_id, listening_id, status) VALUES (#{questionType}, #{question}, #{optionA}, #{optionB}, #{optionC}, #{optionD}, #{options}, #{answer}, #{analysis}, #{difficulty}, #{wordId}, #{articleId}, #{listeningId}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_question WHERE status = 1
